Zanuck Award for best movie — elevating its status as an awards-season front-runner since the last seven PGA winners have gone on to win the Best Picture Oscar. […] "Life Itself," the biographical film about the late Roger Ebert, won the PGA documentary award for director Steve James, Zak Piper and Garrett Basch. Magnolia's "Life Itself," based on Ebert's 2011 autobiography, topped "The Green Prince," "Merchants of Doubt," "Particle Fever" and "Virunga" — which was the only PGA nominee to also receive an Oscar nod FX's "Fargo" won the David L. Wolper Award for longform TV.

partial_support.reason: The passage states that Garrett Basch won the PGA documentary award for 'Life Itself', but does not mention the year he won it.

proofs: "Life Itself," the biographical film about the late Roger Ebert, won the PGA documentary award for director Steve James, Zak Piper and Garrett Basch.
Variety Intelligence Platform January 24, 2015 8:18PM PT
arbiter.why: The shown sentences include a direct statement that Garrett Basch won the PGA documentary award for 'Life Itself' (the Producers Guild of America Award), and the article's date confirms the award was in 2015. All components of the claim are covered verbatim.
